column1: if I get the reservation link is it absolutely locked in? Or can we bail if prices don't work
I think we are going to do it!
how many slots did we need?
perfect I'll start this right now and send over
also quick question can we do different resorts
which resort did you have in mind?
Anything that you think would be around the same price range?
y'all not feelin the Breezes option? its where ost of the college students are
no yes looks awesome! I think we'll do that thank you so much!
okay dope. was that the one on the quote or did I send you the wrong one?
okay bet! did you want me to set up the res now? is everyone ready to roll
cool lets do it. will send in 5
just emailed that over! lmk if y'all need any help navigating the booking portal
Loved “just emailed that over! lmk if y'all need any help navigating the booking portal”
Also so sorry if we were to do party packages do we pay separate?
yea I can add in the party package if youd like. the total per person is $1,245.00 for the 3 person room + 4 event off resort party pass. all open bar events
Waterloo, Aura, Bahamas Beach Bash, and the Pirates Party Cruise
Got it. I think we are all good with what we have. Can we still go to the clubs without the package tho?
nah those are party pass specific nights
you have time to add that to your package tho and can also buy individual events on site when you get there
so no rush you have time to figure it out. best to stick with what you have right now
Hey so some of my friends didn't pay the 200 last night because it was really late... can they pay it today without being kicked off
Yea just need them to hurry if they can
But I got you I kept them all active
Got it they will all have it in by today!
Grace whats up! just checkin in, have you guys booked flights yet?
okay dope! you able to enter that info into your accounts when you can. just so we can start scheduling your transportation
hey whenever you have a min, if you could have Margo upload their flight info so we can schedule airport transfers
Liked “hey whenever you have a min, if you could have Margo upload their flight info so we can schedule airport transfers”
Hey how do I see the ads on packages it doesn't let me see them on the portal
Hey, it should all be there! Do you know what you were looking to add? I can add it in if so
Can we possibly do it when we get there?
you can yes but its def netter to have it before getting down there
which one did we all want to add?
Not sure because I can see the options! Is there anyway You could send me a ss or something
hey actually it'll be best to get it down there when you get there! just checked in
I'll send you what the events are tho
The VIP Party Package for Nassau includes 4 open bar events - Waterloo, Aura, Bahamas Beach Bash and the Blackbeard's Pirates Party
Hey what's the deal with the shuttle
Hey when you land look for the STS Travel sign or staff in a blue shirt branded STS Travel
Loved “Hey when you land look for the STS Travel sign or staff in a blue shirt branded STS Travel”
Quick question don't mean to keep bothering you! Are we able to purchase VIP passes for select nights?
Grace Im so sorry I missed this text
All good do you know what time our shuddle is today
I'll reach out to staff now but do you mind checking with them in the lobby? The STS staff
It was awesome we had so much fun thank you so much
That's awesome. Glad everything worked out
